_sources.ovx: CBOE CDN OVX_History.csv - D0 uses Feb 27 close (Feb 28 = Saturday); D7/D8 carry D6 (weekend, market closed); D10 live via /api/cboe
_sources.vxeem: CBOE CDN VXEEM_History.csv - all D0-D9 confirmed from live data; D7/D8 carry D6 (weekend); D10 live via /api/cboe
_sources.scenarios: D10-D12 confirmed from banker-conflict.json; all prior days estimated from narrative context

days.note: Thu - Iran IRGC commander Abdollahi threatens to block Gulf, Red Sea, and Gulf of Oman if US blockade persists - signals potential Houthi reactivation (NBC, Fortune, Newsweek); Pakistan Field Marshal Asim Munir arrives in Tehran with US message; Iran FM Araghchi meets Pakistani army chief; WH: 'we feel good about prospects of a deal' (CNN, NPR); Trump: war 'very close to over'; Bessent threatens secondary sanctions on Iran oil buyers targeting Chinese banks; Israel-Lebanon ceasefire talks begin (Netanyahu security cabinet); Brent $94.60 confirmed (TradingEconomics, -0.35%); WTI $90.79 confirmed (TradingEconomics, -0.54%); tail risk 34%

Fri - Iran FM Araghchi declares Hormuz 'completely open' - direct contradiction of US blockade; US Navy continues boarding Iran-bound vessels; $20B frozen-assets deal under negotiation (South Korea + Japan assets); second Islamabad talks confirmed for Apr 19 (NBC, CNN, Reuters, Al Jazeera); Brent $91.87 confirmed (TradingEconomics, -2.9%); WTI ~$88.16 est. (-2.9%); iTraxx Asia IG ~175bp (-7bp); tail risk 25%
Sat - market closed; deal framework continues; Islamabad talks Sunday Apr 19 confirmed; Apr 22 ceasefire expiry is binary catalyst; scenarios carried from D47

Mon - Iran re-closes Hormuz (Apr 18-19) after US refuses to lift blockade; IRGC strikes vessels attempting transit; Iran formally rejects Islamabad talks (IRNA Apr 19) - parliament speaker Qalibaf: 'no retreat in diplomacy'; Trump sends negotiators to Pakistan; ceasefire expires Apr 22 - no deal in sight (KPBS, CNN, Time); Brent ~$96 est. (+4.5%; CNN ~$95.71); iTraxx Asia IG ~190bp (+15bp); tail risk rises to 42%

Tue - USS Spruance fires on, boards Iranian-flagged Touska in Gulf of Oman after 6-hour standoff - first US seizure of Iranian vessel (CNBC, Bloomberg, Al Jazeera Apr 19); Iran vows 'swift retaliation'; Iranian FM: 'no decision' on Islamabad talks (NBC); ceasefire expires Apr 22, Trump: extension 'highly unlikely' (CNN Apr 20); Brent ~$99.50 est. (+3.7%; last confirmed $95.42 TradingEconomics Apr 20); iTraxx Asia IG ~205bp (+15bp); tail risk 50%

Wed - Trump extends ceasefire indefinitely at Pakistan request (Field Marshal Munir + PM Sharif); IRGC seizes MSC Francesca + Epaminondas in Hormuz hours after extension (Al Jazeera, CNBC Apr 22); Iranian nat'l security adviser: 'extension has no meaning'; FM Araghchi: blockade is 'act of war'; Brent confirmed $101.73 (+3.3%, TradingEconomics/Fortune Apr 22); TTF confirmed €42.39 (OilPriceAPI Apr 22); JKM confirmed $15.81 (+3.77% Apr 21, TradingEconomics); tail risk revised to 40%

Thu - IRGC seizes MSC Francesca + Epaminondas in Strait of Hormuz (Apr 22) - Iran executes kinetic counter-measure hours after Trump extends ceasefire indefinitely; nat'l security adviser: 'extension has no meaning'; Euphoria (Greek) also stranded (CNBC, NBC, Al Jazeera, WashPost, Euronews); Malaysia: Petronas confirmed net fuel importer (Anwar Apr 4); RON95 quota cut 300L→200L; June supply uncertain (Bernama); Brent $101.73 confirmed (+3.3% Apr 22, TradingEconomics/Fortune); TTF €42.39 confirmed (OilPriceAPI Apr 22); JKM $15.81 confirmed (+3.77% Apr 21, TradingEconomics); D52 Brent ~$102.50 est.; iTraxx Asia IG ~198bp (+8bp); tail risk 40%

Fri - Trump orders US Navy 'shoot and kill' any Iranian boat laying mines in Hormuz - 'There is to be no hesitation' (Al Jazeera, CNBC, WashPost, PBS, TIME, CBC, Apr 23); Iran continues vessel seizure operations; Brent settled $105.33 confirmed (TradingEconomics/CNBC); WTI $94.40 confirmed (CNBC); TTF €44.72 confirmed (TradingEconomics); markets mixed - oil traders expect Islamabad talks Sat Apr 25; iTraxx Asia IG ~205bp est.; tail risk 45%

Sat - market closed; Iran FM Araghchi departs Pakistan without meeting US envoys; Trump tells Witkoff and Kushner not to travel to Islamabad ('Too much time wasted on traveling'); second Islamabad round fully collapses; Araghchi: 'Have yet to see if US is truly serious'; Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended 3 weeks (CBS News, White House); tail risk rises to 50%

Sun - market closed; Trump: 'no time frame' on Iran war, 'Don't rush me' (CNN); ceasefire nominally in force but talks fully collapsed - no active back-channel; Iran holds 3 Western vessels (MSC Francesca, Epaminondas, Euphoria); US blockade intact; scenarios carried from D54

Mon - Araghchi visits Oman Sultan Haitham (traditional US-Iran back-channel) after Islamabad failure; returns to Islamabad; next stop Moscow (ANI, Washington Times, CNN, Apr 26); Araghchi: deal 'just inches away' but criticizes 'maximalist US demands'; Trump unharmed in third assassination attempt at WH Correspondents' Dinner Apr 25 (Cole Allen, CA, in custody; CNN, Fox News, Al Jazeera); Iran mocks Trump in video response (Al Jazeera, Apr 26); Brent ~$106 est. (+0.6%); tail risk 47% (down from 50% on Oman back-channel signal)
